ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-20-2003 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2003 Continued To Sep-02-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Defaul Prov-Up
Off Calendar Jul-17-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, CSR: Leticia Perez, Bailiff: Louise Perotti, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo
Annie Horton, Esq. for Plaintiff, Property Manager, Greg Markoulis also present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff Angelo Markoulis and against the defendant CHD G and T International Inc.
Damages of $15,014.66
No attorney fees
Total Judgment of $15,014.66
Judgment signed in open court.
